limitations: Does not establish clinical actionability for any MRD result.
Requires expert review before use as an educational anchor.
Does not establish assay interchangeability, modality ranking, prognosis, monitoring action, treatment guidance, or patient-specific residual-disease interpretation.
Does not perform quality review of real laboratory reports, imaging reports, pathology reports, biopsy reports, raw values, exact person-linked timing, or private records.
Does not convert refusal states into clinical meaning.
